text.title: Google Performance Max Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is monthly_conversions ≥30 AND conversion API live AND brand negatives ready?

conclusion.verdict: run Shopping-blended PMax with product asset groups
run lead-gen PMax with audience-themed asset groups

text.example: 95 conv/mo, CAPI live, brand negatives ready, no product feed → audience-themed asset groups.
